title: armeria douglasii
intro: Armeria douglasii, also known as the Douglas' sea thrift or coastal armeria, is a perennial herbaceous flowering plant native to the western coast of North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing due to the presence of sesquiterpenes and other bioactive compounds. Armeria douglasii has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, wounds, and skin irritations, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Armeria douglasii include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used topically or internally to leverage its health benefits.
